시편 132:1.content: Yahweh, remember David and all his affliction,

시편 132:2.content: how he swore to Yahweh, and vowed to the Mighty One of Jacob:

시편 132:3.content: “Surely I will not come into the structure of my house, nor go up into my bed;

시편 132:4.content: I will not give sleep to my eyes, or slumber to my eyelids;

시편 132:5.content: until I find out a place for Yahweh, a dwelling for the Mighty One of Jacob.”

시편 132:6.content: Behold, we heard of it in Ephrathah. We found it in the field of Jaar:

시편 132:7.content: “We will go into his dwelling place. We will worship at his footstool.

시편 132:8.content: Arise, Yahweh, into your resting place, you, and the ark of your strength.

시편 132:9.content: Let your priests be clothed with righteousness. Let your saints shout for joy!”

시편 132:10.content: For your servant David’s sake, don’t turn away the face of your anointed one.

시편 132:11.content: Yahweh has sworn to David in truth. He will not turn from it: “I will set the fruit of your body on your throne.

시편 132:12.content: If your children will keep my covenant, my testimony that I will teach them, their children also will sit on your throne forever more.”

시편 132:13.content: For Yahweh has chosen Zion. He has desired it for his habitation.

시편 132:14.content: “This is my resting place forever. I will live here, for I have desired it.

시편 132:15.content: I will abundantly bless her provision. I will satisfy her poor with bread.

시편 132:16.content: I will also clothe her priests with salvation. Her saints will shout aloud for joy.

시편 132:17.content: I will make the horn of David to bud there. I have ordained a lamp for my anointed.

시편 132:18.content: I will clothe his enemies with shame, but on himself, his crown will shine.”
